title: 00575_AdaptDiffuser_Diffusion_Models_as_Adaptive_Self-evolving_Planners
positive_examples: AdaptDiffuser improves the performance of diffusion-based planners in offline reinforcement learning, enhancing adaptability to unseen tasks without additional expert data.
The method generates high-quality synthetic data, which can lead to better decision-making in robotics and other applications, potentially improving efficiency in various industries.
